description:
i2pd (I2P Daemon) is a full-featured C++ implementation of I2P client.

i2pd (I2P Daemon) is a full-featured C++ implementation of I2P client.
I2P (Invisible Internet Protocol) is a universal anonymous network layer.
All communications over I2P are anonymous and end-to-end encrypted, participants don"t reveal their real IP addresses.
1.  Implemented torsocks support in SOCKS proxy
2.  Fixed Incorrect offline signature in CLOSE streaming packet
3.  Always send ".b32.i2p" in "Host:" header from HTTP proxy
4.  Fixed "i2cp.closeIdleTime" and "i2cp.newDestOnResume" for default HTTP and SOCKS proxy
5.  Set SSU2 default crypto type to ML-KEM-768 when applicable
6.  Implemented peer ordering keys and groups
7.  "keepaliveinterval" for UDP client tunnel
8.  Support OpenSSL 4
9.  Fixed websocket connection get terminated immediately through HTTP server tunnel
10. Support ".b32.i2p" and B33 hosts in SAM datagram destinations
11. Send data with SYN streaming packet if available
12. Post-quantum support with LibreSSL
13. Option to disable unveil/pledge in OpenBSD
14. Handle 'm' and 'r' tunnel build request options
15. Update destination's transient keys through SAM
16. Try to reseed again after 30 second if failed
17. Show router caps in main window for Windows and Haiku
